inputs.titre: Première culture commerciale de caoutchouc à partir de l'hévéa en Asie du Sud-Est

reason:
The image depicts a scene in a tropical setting, likely a rubber plantation in Southeast Asia. The workers are wearing appropriate clothing for the era. The presence of the wooden cart and simple buildings suggest an era before widespread mechanization. The image lacks any obvious modern anachronisms or fantastical elements.

However, a few things prevent a higher score. The clothing seems a bit *too* modern in its cut and finish. Also, the trees seem to be palm trees instead of rubber trees.
